title: 4 Reykjavik - 3 Akureyri - flight

day_descriptions.Day 1: Arrive Reykjavik. Transfer to hotel. Evening in the capital.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Golden Circle full day: Þingvellir, Geysir, Gullfoss.
day_descriptions.Day 3: South Coast tour: waterfalls, black beach, glacier lagoon.
day_descriptions.Day 4: Blue Lagoon transfer. Afternoon free in Reykjavik.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Internal flight Reykjavik to Akureyri. Iceland's northern capital sits at the end of a long fjord. Midnight sun in summer.
day_descriptions.Day 6: Lake Myvatn geothermal area and Dimmuborgir lava formations day trip. Whale watching optional from Akureyri harbour.
day_descriptions.Day 7: Free day in Akureyri. Botanical garden, old town, optional horse riding.
day_descriptions.Day 8: Fly Akureyri to Keflavik international. Depart.

description: Reykjavik's Golden Circle and northern Iceland's whale-watching capital Akureyri in a seven-night fly-drive with an internal flight.
